sample.assembled: Provide a comprehensive, detailed explanation. Include code examples where relevant. Focus particularly on error handling.

checks: returns a single space-joined instruction string assembled from the supplied preferences enum
defaults to 'Provide a clear, detailed answer.' when preferences are absent or empty

provider.notes: NOT a brace template — the string is assembled at runtime from the PromptVariables.preferences enum (verbosity: brief|detailed; includeExamples: boolean; focusArea: string). No template tokens, so dialect=none skips the scan. Feeds the {{additionalInstructions}} slot of core-qa-template.
